configurations.name: server
runtimeArgs: export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && npm run dev -w server

configurations.name: client
runtimeArgs: export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && npm run dev -w client

configurations.name: client-remote
runtimeArgs: export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && VITE_API_TARGET=http://192.168.50.80:3001 npm run dev -w client
